ideation: This sequence will depict a bowing gesture, common in showing respect at Shinto shrines.  The animation will focus on a smooth, controlled lowering and raising of the arms, mirroring the respectful nature of a bow.  The arms will move in unison, maintaining symmetry throughout the sequence.  I will use the existing examples to guide the range of motion and ensure the transitions are natural and fluid.  The final frame will return to a neutral, relaxed pose.

frames.beat: arms lower in a respectful bow
the bow deepens slightly, a moment of reverence
arms rise back to a neutral, respectful stance
